commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: David also says: "Sacrifice and oblation Thou didst not desire, but mine ears hast Thou perfected;

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: What is To do Your will? To give up Myself, He means: This is the will of God. By which Will we are sanctified. Or he even means something still further, that the sacrifices do not make men clean, but the Will of God. Therefore to offer sacrifice is not the will of God.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
